test.name: TC_WEB_POC_001

kw.name: Open web browser by url
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "args": ["--start-maximized"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/rajitkaew.j/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/testcases/browser/traces/temp/d2f412d1-8ae0-4e43-af41-6d2588c570f7"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": null }

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': None}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Keyword 'Take Screenshot fail-screenshot-{index}' could not be run on failure: Error: Tried to take screenshot, but no page was open.

Error: page.goto: Protocol error (Page.navigate): Cannot navigate to invalid URL Call log: - navigating to "{'url': {'en': 'https://www.gother.online/en-us', 'th': 'https://www.gother.online/th-th'}}", waiting until "load"
kw.status: Error: page.goto: Protocol error (Page.navigate): Cannot navigate to invalid URL Call log: - navigating to "{'url': {'en': 'https://www.gother.online/en-us', 'th': 'https://www.gother.online/th-th'}}", waiting until "load"

kw.doc: ใช้สำหรับเปิด Web browser Arguments: - ${url} (string) ลิ้งของเว็ปที่ต้องการเปิด: https://google.com - ${supported_browser} (string) ระบบ Browser ที่รองรับ: chromium, firefox, webkit - ${headless_mode} (bool) เปิด Browser ในโหมดไร้หน้าต่าง (No GUI): True or False
kw.status: Error: page.goto: Protocol error (Page.navigate): Cannot navigate to invalid URL Call log: - navigating to "{'url': {'en': 'https://www.gother.online/en-us', 'th': 'https://www.gother.online/th-th'}}", waiting until "load"

test.status: Error: page.goto: Protocol error (Page.navigate): Cannot navigate to invalid URL Call log: - navigating to "{'url': {'en': 'https://www.gother.online/en-us', 'th': 'https://www.gother.online/th-th'}}", waiting until "load"
